title: salvia ovalifolia var. villosa
intro: Salvia ovalifolia var. villosa, also known as Villosa Salvia, is a variety of the Salvia ovalifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The Villosa Salvia is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Salvia ovalifolia var. villosa are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
